<!-- indicator: fig-lead-children -->

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| label: fig-lead-children
#| fig-cap: 'Percentage of Children Tested for Lead Before 36 Months of Age, 2013, 2016, 2017, and 2019'
#| fig-alt: 'Data visualization showing Percentage of Children Tested for Lead Before 36 Months of Age, 2013, 2016, 2017, and 2019.'
from scripts.cha_registry_renderer import render_figure_object
render_figure_object(figure_id="fig-lead-children", workbook_path=CHA_WORKBOOK_PATH).show()
```
